final_session_calls.command:
cd /work && python3 -c "
import re
with open('tests/test_basic.py', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Replace the specific chain usage in the parametrize decorator
old = '''    chain(
        ((x, \"True\") for x in (\"1\", \"true\", \"t\", \"yes\", \"y\", \"on\")),
        ((x, \"False\") for x in (\"0\", \"false\", \"f\", \"no\", \"n\", \"off\")),
    ),'''
new = '''    list(chain(
        ((x, \"True\") for x in (\"1\", \"true\", \"t\", \"yes\", \"y\", \"on\")),
        ((x, \"False\") for x in (\"0\", \"false\", \"f\", \"no\", \"n\", \"off\")),
    )),'''

content = content.replace(old, new)

with open('tests/test_basic.py', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)
"

final_session_calls.command:
cd /work && python -c "
lines = open('tests/test_basic.py').readlines()
# Find the parametrize block starting at line 237 (0-indexed: 236)
# Replace lines 236-242 (the decorator) with the list version
new_lines = lines[:236]
new_lines.append('@pytest.mark.parametrize(\n')
new_lines.append('    (\"value\", \"expect\"),\n')
new_lines.append('    [\n')
new_lines.append('        (\"1\", \"True\"), (\"true\", \"True\"), (\"t\", \"True\"),\n')
new_lines.append('        (\"yes\", \"True\"), (\"y\", \"True\"), (\"on\", \"True\"),\n')
new_lines.append('        (\"0\", \"False\"), (\"false\", \"False\"), (\"f\", \"False\"),\n')
new_lines.append('        (\"no\", \"False\"), (\"n\", \"False\"), (\"off\", \"False\"),\n')
new_lines.append('    ],\n')
new_lines.append(')\n')
new_lines.extend(lines[243:])
open('tests/test_basic.py', 'w').writelines(new_lines)
"
